title: Warm Cinematic Ambient Background Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Warm Cinematic Ambient Background Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic South Asian festive close-up portrait built around adult South Asian woman with dark wavy hair, sharp dark brown eyes, and confident over-shoulder gaze, deep crimson open-back blouse with intricate mirror embroidery, traditional jewelry, and warm reflected highlights, and close-up over-the-shoulder pose with bold confident eye contact and calm cinematic intensity. Subject: adult South Asian woman with dark wavy hair, sharp dark brown eyes, and confident over-shoulder gaze appears as the adult portrait subject with natural skin texture, sharp eyes, and confident editorial presence. deep crimson open-back blouse with intricate mirror embroidery, traditional jewelry, and warm reflected highlights provides the deep crimson embroidered fashion focus. Scene: warm cinematic ambient background with soft golden light, shallow depth, and subtle traditional interior texture stays soft and atmospheric, with dreamy festive bokeh and warm ambient depth behind the subject. Composition: Fixed near-camera 35mm close-up crop, over-the-shoulder eye-line, face framed by chandelier earrings, visible open-back blouse detail, shallow depth of field, and magazine-photo hierarchy. Signature Elements: close-up over-the-shoulder pose with bold confident eye contact and calm cinematic intensity locks the bold over-the-shoulder mood while keeping the source close-up crop and confident gaze. Style: Photoreal cinematic editorial portrait with rich high-contrast color grading, natural skin texture, warm ambient light, and ultra-detailed traditional fashion styling. Color Palette: Fixed deep crimson, warm gold, dark hair, rich brown eyes, red and white jewelry accents, and colorful festive bokeh. Lighting: Warm ambient portrait light catches mirror embroidery, earrings, tassels, skin texture, and hair highlights without flattening the face. Materials: Mirror embroidery, delicate string ties, tassels, chandelier earrings, soft draped fabric, and polished festive jewelry remain crisp. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
